result.finding: Linux (Ubuntu-based) as the container runtime OS via eclipse-temurin:8-jre. The docker-compose.yml includes ARM64 support note for Oracle DB image. Development setup scripts include both Linux/macOS (shell scripts) and Windows (PowerShell scripts).
evidence: Dockerfile final stage: FROM eclipse-temurin:8-jre — Eclipse Temurin images are Ubuntu-based (jammy/focal)
Dockerfile build stage: FROM maven:3.9.6-eclipse-temurin-8 — also Ubuntu-based
docker-compose.yml comment: 'oracle-db: Oracle Database Free 23ai - supports ARM64 and x86_64'
oracle-init/create-user.sh — Linux shell script for DB initialization
azure-setup.ps1, azure-reset.ps1 — PowerShell scripts for Windows development setup
values: Container runtime OS: Linux (Ubuntu, eclipse-temurin:8-jre base)
Architecture support: x86_64 (amd64) and ARM64 (via Oracle image)
Development host OS: Windows (PowerShell scripts), Linux/macOS (shell scripts)
